headline: Is It Time To Reassess Axon Enterprise (AXON) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Axon Enterprise is attractively priced after a strong multi year run, this article breaks down what the current share price might be implying about future expectations. The stock closed at US$397.12, with returns of a 1.4% decline over 7 days, a 13.7% decline over 30 days, a 29.5% decline year to date, a 34.2% decline over 1 year, but rises of 88.5% over 3 years and 161.9% over 5 years. This performance can change how the risk and reward trade off looks...
